Jensen Huang:

“(AI) is not a biological being. It is not alien. It is not conscious. It is computer software.”

“We say things like, ‘We don't understand it at all.’ It is not true. We understand a lot of things about this technology.”

Travis Kalanick: Tesla is the Google of the Physical AI Era

“I like to break down the physical AI stack: (it) includes computation, a physical AI model, all the things you think of.”

“What about land? Development? That should be in that stack. What about chemistry? That needs to be in the stack. Manufacturing needs to be a stack.”

“When you look at the stack, you're like, ‘Damn, Tesla's got this sh*t.’ They are the Google of this era.”

Chamath Explains Why AI is So Unpopular in America: Terrible Communication from Industry Leaders

“ ICE is more popular than AI. That's where AI is.”

Why is this happening? Three reasons according to @chamath:

“Entrepreneurs are A/B testing what it takes to raise money.”

“At least some parts of the AI ecosystem have decided that this crazy, scary doomerism is the best way to raise money.”

“What I mean by that is not produce adequate profits.”

“When we look at the bubble question on AI, what a lot of people don't realize in bubbles is that through all technologies, they think that they are betting on the technology when they buy the stocks in the companies.”

Friedberg:

“ Why designate them as a supply chain risk? Why not just abandon them, move on, use the other vendors? Why take this kind of punitive action?”

Under Secretary of War Emil Michael:

“I don't view it as punitive, and I'll tell you why.”
